metadata.review_only_rule: local-evidence gap exports are expert-review context only; automation keeps all rows as no_decision and cannot count them without explicit local evidence, review resolution, and factory gate acceptance

local_evidence_gap_context.review_policy: local-evidence gap rows are evidence-repair work only; they cannot become countable labels without explicit local mechanistic evidence, external review resolution, and a passing label-factory gate
